title: SIP Decline
description: Rejects an incoming call with a SIP error response. Used to decline calls with a specific status code and reason (e.g. 486 Busy Here, 603 Decline).

id.description: An optional unique identifier for this verb instance.

status.description: The SIP response status code to send.

reason.description: The SIP reason phrase to include in the response.

headers.description: Custom SIP headers to include in the response.
